title: 3D_totem_Dream_ByS
description: 3d totem in the form of a YouTuber dream, now you have a beautiful 3d totem instead of a boring flat one!
body: This texture pack changes the regular totem to a custom 3D totem with the YouTuber Dream. Now you have a beautiful 3D totem instead of a boring flat one. You need Optifine or Cit resewn to use it. Enjoy the game!
